hooks.command: PY="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/spec/.venv"/bin/python; [ -x "$PY" ] || PY="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/spec/.venv"/Scripts/python.exe; if [ -x "$PY" ]; then "$PY" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/spec/tools/gen_spec.py"; else uv run --project "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/spec" python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/spec/tools/gen_spec.py"; fi >/dev/null 2>&1 || true # R-sensorium-committed
